fragments.plaintext:
They didn’t suit up for silver. 

Laila Edwards and
Women’s Hockey put the squeeze on Canada to claim Gold in the Olympic final.

caption.text:
They didn’t suit up for silver. 

Laila Edwards and @teamusa Women’s Hockey put the squeeze on Canada to claim Gold in the Olympic final.

fragments.plaintext:
Fast? Try flawless. 

Choi Minjeong, Kim Gilli and Team South Korea make a statement in the 3000m Relay, upsetting the field for straight Gold on the Short Track.

caption.text:
Fast? Try flawless. 

Choi Minjeong, Kim Gilli and Team South Korea make a statement in the 3000m Relay, upsetting the field for straight Gold on the Short Track.

fragments.plaintext:
Nobody called it. But everyone felt it. 

Arianna Fontana and Team Italy dominate the Olympic field and snatch Gold in the Short Track Mixed Relay.

caption.text:
Nobody called it. But everyone felt it. 

Arianna Fontana and Team Italy dominate the Olympic field and snatch Gold in the Short Track Mixed Relay.

fragments.plaintext: When you’re this fast, you don't ask for permission. Jutta Leerdam breaks the Olympic record in the Speed Skating 1000m and wins her first Gold.

caption.text: When you’re this fast, you don't ask for permission. Jutta Leerdam breaks the Olympic record in the Speed Skating 1000m and wins her first Gold.

fragments.plaintext:
The Rebel of Skating returns. 

Alysa Liu and Team USA secure Gold in the Team Event for figure skating.

caption.text:
The Rebel of Skating returns. 

Alysa Liu and Team USA secure Gold in the Team Event for figure skating.
